calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-26-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Daniel Bornstein, Esq., for the Plaintiff Trinity Management Services.
Witness Jacky Lopez sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant(s) Jonatha Doyle and Marie Coletta Donnelly (Request to Enter Default as to Marie Coletta Donnelly on file).
Court Ordered Defendants Does 1-10 Dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant(s) Jonathan Doyle and Marie Coletta Donnelly as follows:
The Lease is forfeited and terminated.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1169 Market Street, #48 San Francisco, CA 94103.

Damages $3,624.58
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs to be submited via Memorandum of Costs.
for a Total Judgment of $3,624.58
Judgment signed in open court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Nov-26-2012 Assigned To Trial Court
